overview: SalesForge CRM is a complete, production-quality Sales CRM frontend application with 13 fully-featured modules including pipeline management, lead tracking, customer profiles, team performance, communications, analytics, and more — built with a premium enterprise SaaS design.
features: Premium dashboard with KPI cards and 6 analytics charts
Leads management with table, kanban, and card views
Customer profiles with activity history and payment records
Sales team leaderboard with performance metrics
Task management with list, kanban, calendar, and agenda views
Calendar with meeting scheduler and recurring events
Unified communication center for emails, calls, and messages
Reports module with 7 report types and interactive charts
Settings with 9 tabs including roles, billing, and integrations
Authentication pages with 2FA and OTP verification
